title: A Trendless Market And A Brave New World
section_path: A Trendless Market And A Brave New World
section_path_text: A Trendless Market And A Brave New World
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
Global markets awoke from twelve years of a QE-induced haze to realise that the world is full of danger and risk. Meanwhile, many an active manager have changed professions and those that remain barely remember a time without the Fed's safety net. Last week it was inflation and the Russia's guessing game in Europe.

children.title: Main
children.summary:
By George Lagarias
Global markets awoke from twelve years of a QE-induced haze to realise that the world is full of danger and risk. Meanwhile, many an active manager have changed professions and those that remain barely remember a time without the Fed's safety net.

children.title: We feel that the market is not in a transitional phase, but rather at a crossroads.
section_path: We feel that the market is not in a transitional phase, but rather at a crossroads.
children.section_path_text: We feel that the market is not in a transitional phase, but rather at a crossroads.
children.summary: On the right , a road returning to investing as we once knew it: de-correlation, higher volatility, a world where opportunity and risk co-existed. Active asset managers will probably be rewarded and economic growth, albeit volatile, will be higher.
